Premium Experience
Our Story

Your Perfect Family Escape

Nestled amidst the lush green landscapes of Padinjarathara, Kerala, Leisure Family Villas offers an exclusive retreat where luxury meets nature. Our villa is designed to give families the perfect balance of comfort, privacy, and breathtaking natural beauty.

From the stunning panoramic views of the Western Ghats to the private swimming pool surrounded by swaying palms, every corner of Leisure has been crafted to create memories that will last a lifetime.

Private Pool
Mountain Views
Bonfire Area
Lush Gardens
Why Choose Us

The Leisure Difference

🏊

Private Pool

A stunning private pool overlooking lush paddy fields and the Western Ghats — yours alone.

👪

Family Friendly

Thoughtfully designed spaces for families of all sizes with safe, comfortable environments for all ages.

🌿

Nature Retreat

Surrounded by coconut groves, banana plantations and mountain vistas for total rejuvenation.

🔥

Bonfire Nights

Magical evening bonfire experiences for the whole family under the Kerala night sky.

🛌

Luxe Rooms

Spacious, elegantly furnished bedrooms with premium bedding and modern amenities throughout.

📶

Free Wi-Fi

Stay connected with high-speed internet throughout the property, for work or leisure.

🌅

Scenic Views

Breathtaking sunrise and sunset panoramas from every level of the villa.

🏠

Full Privacy

The entire villa is exclusively yours — no shared spaces, just pure private luxury.

The Experience

Life at Leisure

Every space at Leisure Family Villas is an invitation to relax, reconnect, and create lasting memories together.

The Private Pool

Swim in crystal blue waters with panoramic views of Kerala's green countryside

Luxury Bedrooms

Spacious, elegant rooms designed for deep rest and complete comfort

Bonfire Evenings

Gather around the fire under the open Kerala sky for unforgettable family evenings

Outdoor Deck

BBQ, swing, and lounge areas in a tropical garden setting

Sunset Views

Watch golden sunsets melt over the mountains from your private poolside

Guest Reviews

What Families Say

★★★★★

"The most beautiful villa stay our family has ever had. The pool view over the paddy fields, the bonfire at night — everything was magical. We will definitely be back!"

— Priya R., Calicut

★★★★★

"Absolutely stunning property in the heart of Kerala's nature. The rooms were spotless, the pool was refreshing, and the hospitality was warm and genuine. Perfect family getaway."

— Arun M., Bangalore

★★★★★

"Leisure Family Villas exceeded all our expectations. Waking up to that mountain view with your morning chai is priceless. Our kids loved the pool and the bonfire evening was unforgettable."

— Sarah & Thomas, Kochi

★★★★★

"We've stayed at many resorts in Wayanad but nothing compares to the privacy and comfort here. It truly feels like your own private paradise. Book it — you won't regret it."

— Faizal K., Dubai
